title: Korean-Style Pak Choi Ssam
description: A simple and flavorful Korean-inspired dish featuring gently sautéed pak choi wrapped in a tender korean wrap.
instructions: 1. Cut the pak choi into thin strips and set aside.
2. In a small pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
4. Add the pak choi to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar and toasted sesame seeds.
6. To assemble the ssam, place a few strips of pak choi onto a korean wrap, drizzle with the vinegar mixture, and sprinkle with additional toasted sesame seeds if desired.
